display.title: Display & Theme
display.darkModeDesc: Apply a dark theme across the system.
display.highContrastDesc: Increase color contrast for better readability.

language.title: Language
language.desc: Select the display language of the application.

system.title: System & Security
system.offlineMapsDesc: Download data in advance to use maps without a network connection.
system.biometricAuthDesc: Require FaceID/Fingerprint for admin page access.

data.title: Data Management
data.cacheDesc: Delete cached data stored in the current app.

device.title: Device & Permission Settings
device.subtitle: Manage permissions for offline maps, biometric lock, camera, location, and push notifications.

offlineMap.title: Offline Map Data
offlineMap.description: Pre-save map and key image data to your device so you can continue using them even in unstable network environments.

biometric.title: Biometric Lock
biometric.description: Enhance security by requiring FaceID or fingerprint authentication when accessing the admin page.
biometric.lockedSubtitle: Biometric authentication is required to access this page.
biometric.unsupportedNote: Current browser does not support WebAuthn/Biometrics. Replaced with Mock authentication.

permissions.title: Device Permission Status
permissions.description: Manage permissions required to use key features of VX Web V2.
